translations.en: Healer
a somber and calm gargoyle.
translations.zh: 神色肅穆而沉靜之魔像。

translations.en: "An in mani u
lem
, An-bal-sil-fer."
The gargoyle says nothing else.
"To be unwilling to help you, False Prophet."
"To be a healer, a being of peace."
"Elsewise, to summon the guards to slay you!"
translations.zh: 「否則，吾將召喚護衛將汝誅殺！」

translations.en: The gargoyle says nothing else.
"To be happy to see you again, noble one."
"But to be sad that you seek my services."
translations.zh: 「然見汝需要吾之服務，吾深感惋惜。」

translations.en: "To see the amulet, the symbol of your courage and nobility."
translations.zh: 「見護符在頸，此乃汝之勇氣與榮譽之象徵。」

translations.en: "To wish to help you however I can."
"To ask me to raise the dead?"
"To apologize, but that is beyond my power."
translations.zh: 「深表歉意，然此超出吾之能力。」

translations.en: "To doubt that anyone can do that!"
"May fortune prevent the need for your return!"
"To be nameless, being only a healer."
"To be entrusted with the tasks of @healing those wounded and @curing those sick."
translations.zh: 「受託執行@healing療傷與@curing治病之職責。」

translations.en: "To do this for all, as a service to society."
translations.zh: 「此乃吾對社會之奉獻，為所有人服務。」

translations.en: "The goodscrafter? To regret his condition."
"To know that he is in great pain after the loss of his @family."
translations.zh: 「知曉他在失去@family家人後，承受著極大的痛苦。」

translations.en: "To know that his family was lost when the edges of the world @fell off."
translations.zh: 「其家人在世界邊緣@fell崩裂之際而亡。」
translations.note: 大災變：世界邊緣崩裂，指守則之書被盜後

translations.en: "But to have less and less patience for his dispassionate self-pity."
translations.zh: 「然對其冷漠的自憐，吾已愈來愈缺乏耐心。」

translations.en: "Yes, during the cataclysms."
"To have lost friends myself during that bad time."
translations.zh: 「那段艱難歲月中，吾自身亦失去了朋友。」

translations.en: "But to maintain the struggle for life diligently!"
translations.zh: 「然吾勤勉地堅守對生命的奮鬥！」

translations.en: "To be a healer, dedicated only to my @job. To know nothing about $Z."
translations.zh: 「吾乃醫者，只專注於@job本職。對$Z一無所知。」

translations.en: "To ask that you see me at my shop."
"To be unfamiliar with human anatomy..."
translations.zh: 「吾對人類的身體構造不甚熟悉……」

translations.en: "But to be certain that you are well!"
"To be unfamiliar with human anatomy..."
translations.zh: 「吾對人類的身體構造不甚熟悉……」

translations.en: "But to be certain that all of you are well!"
"Which of you?"
The gargoyle mixes strange powders into a foul-smelling brew.
translations.zh: 魔像將奇異粉末混入一碗惡臭的藥汁。

translations.en: You drink the potion and feel restored!
translations.zh: 你喝下藥水，感到精力恢復！

translations.en: $Y drinks the potion and feels restored!
"To drink this and be healthy."
Do
you
es $Y
drink it?
The gargoyle shrugs.
"To assure you that it is safe and invigorating."
translations.zh: 「可向汝保證此藥安全且提神。」

translations.en: "But not to force anyone to act against their will."
translations.zh: 「然吾不強迫任何人違背意願行事。」

translations.en: You drink the potion and feel
$Y drinks the potion and feels
deathly ill!
slightly dizzy.
translations.note: 旁白後半（輕微副作用版）

translations.en: "To apologize for the error! But to know exactly what I did wrong."
translations.zh: 「為錯誤深表歉意！然吾已確知何處出了差錯。」

translations.en: The gargoyle mixes a different drink that somehow smells worse than the last.
translations.zh: 魔像調製另一杯飲品，不知為何比上一杯更難聞。

translations.en: "To ask if there is aught else I can do for you?"
translations.zh: 「問汝是否還有其他吾可效勞之處？」

translator_notes: 魔像醫者沉穩以和，對護符後的玩家態度轉為友善。治療互動旁白清晰。大災變（world edges fell off）為魔像視角描述守則之書被盜後的地震：世界邊緣碎裂。魔像語前三行（An in mani u / lem / An-bal-sil-fer）保留原文。
